plan:
### Screenshot Analysis
The current screen shows Slide 1 in LibreOffice Impress. The slide contains images and some text, and the left panel displays the slide thumbnails. There are a total of 22 slides in the presentation visible in the left panel. The task specifies making modifications to text boxes in Slide 14, but Slide 14 is not visible in the current view.

### Next Action
Scroll down the slide overview panel to bring Slide 14 into view.

### Grounded Action
```python
agent.scroll("The slide thumbnails panel on the left side of the screen", -5)
```
plan_code: agent.scroll("The slide thumbnails panel on the left side of the screen", -5)
exec_code: import pyautogui; import time; pyautogui.moveTo(170, 535); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.vscroll(-5)

### Screenshot Analysis
The text "Target audience" is highlighted successfully, and the formatting toolbar on the right side displays its current font size as 70 pt. The text is ready for modification.

### Next Action
Update the font size of the highlighted text to 60 pt as instructed.

### Grounded Action
```python
agent.type("The font size input field in the right-side formatting toolbar", text="60", overwrite=True, enter=True)
```
